title: Remove Gallery section content wrapper from Gallery.tsx

requirements.summary: Strip all visible content from the Gallery section, leaving only a minimal shell element for anchor linking without any nested content wrapper divs, image cards, grid containers, headings, or other child elements
acceptanceCriteria: The Gallery section on the live page displays no image cards, grid layouts, or content wrapper divs.
Gallery.tsx contains no nested content wrapper divs with gallery card children.
The page renders without errors after the removal.
No visible gallery content appears between the MoreThanMusic and Testimonials sections.

file_operations.description: Remove all JSX content inside the Gallery section element, including any content wrapper divs, grid containers, headings, image cards, and decorative elements. Retain only the outer section element with id='gallery' for anchor link compatibility, but strip all child elements so that no visible gallery content renders on the page.
